response.justification: Bogdan Szabo's resume demonstrates extensive experience in software development across multiple domains, including AI-agent infrastructure, embedded systems, and performance optimization. However, his background lacks direct experience with hardware architecture, SoC/IP modeling, or deep-learning workload optimization—core requirements for the Principal Performance Architect role. His expertise in web/mobile development and cloud infrastructure does not align closely enough with the specialized hardware and AI accelerator focus of the position.
strengths: Strong background in performance optimization and low-latency systems (e.g., work at Dunnhumby)
Experience with hardware-adjacent programming (C/C++, embedded systems)
Proven ability to lead technical projects and open-source contributions
concerns: No documented experience with SoC/IP modeling or AI accelerator architecture
Lacks direct involvement in deep-learning workload optimization or GPU architecture design
Education and work history are heavily skewed toward software/web development rather than hardware-centric roles
